name: Edamame and Broccoli Rice Bowl
method: Add water to a medium saucepan with a steamer insert and bring to a boil. Add the broccoli to the insert and steam over boiling water for 10 minutes. Remove from steamer and set aside.
Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan and add the edamame and salt. Boil for 5 minutes, adding the peas during the last minute. Drain and set aside.
Meanwhile, add 2 tablespoons water to a small skillet and heat over medium-high heat. Add the bell pepper and sauté for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside.
Add all the ingredients plus 5 tablespoons water to a small bowl and blend until smooth.
Add the rice to the bottom of each bowl. Divide the remaining items in half and add onto the rice in a pinwheel fashion, making sure that the greens don’t touch each other for a more pleasing design.
